channel.title: Security-Updates on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Security-Updates on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: aks: Release 2026-05-29
item.description:
AKS release 2026-05-29 rolls out Kubernetes 1.36 preview and patch updates for 1.35.5/1.34.8/1.33.12, with multiple security and component updates. It also adds Windows Server 2025 and Azure Container Linux GA, expands AKS Automatic and LocalDNS behavior changes, and includes several retirement/deprecation notices for older Windows and Flatcar node images.

  • Source: Release notes from AKS

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure Sphere will be retired on July 31, 2031
item.description:
Azure Sphere will be retired on July 31, 2031. After that date, Microsoft will stop providing customer application, OS, bug, and security updates, as well as DAA certificate issuance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: aks: Release Notes - 2026-03-05
item.description:
AKS released new Kubernetes patch versions, updated several components and node images, and introduced/expanded features including OTLP gRPC support for Azure Monitor Profile, GA auto-instrumentation, and broader Azure Linux GPU and KAITO support. It also announced deprecations and behavior changes, including retirement dates for Flatcar preview support and deprecation of Kubernetes LTS 1.28.

  • Source: Release notes from AKS
